integration_validation_v2.gap: Redaction/tarball logic is real (regex secret scan, per-artifact redaction before embedding), but TraceSource has NO production impl and RetrievalTraceExporter has ZERO non-test callers; proof loads traces/artifacts from in-memory stubs only — never the real ArtifactStore.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/memory/trace_export.rs:233-303 real export + artifact redaction; redact via regex secret_re() line 390-392; grep: impl TraceSource only at trace_export.rs:594/744/792/815 (all #[cfg(test)] stubs); RetrievalTraceExporter::new appears only inside trace_export.rs test module (664-759), no src/ or app/ production caller; tests/trace_export_tests.rs:53-86 FixedSource mock.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Production src/memory/trace_export_postgres.rs - PostgresTraceSource impl TraceSource persisting/loading TraceBundle as kernel_event_ledger rows + loading hash-validated bytes from real ArtifactStore (validate_artifact_content_hash); export_persisted_trace (:204) is the production non-test caller of RetrievalTraceExporter::new and appends auditable export-receipt ledger event. Proof tests/atelier_trace_export_postgres_tests.rs: persist -> FRESH-instance PG re-read byte-equal; tarball embeds real ArtifactStore bytes with planted secret redacted; bundle+receipt EventLedger asserts; idempotent persist re-reads latest. V2 gap (no production impl, zero non-test callers, no real ArtifactStore) closed.
integration_validation_v3.gap: export_persisted_trace not yet invoked from an app/IPC surface (tests only) - V2 gap as worded is closed; follow-on wiring note.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs
